question_en: When natural products are converted into other forms through manufacturing, it is known as which sector?
question_hi: जब प्राकृतिक उत्पादों को विनिर्माण के माध्यमों से अन्य रूपों में परिवर्तित किया जाता है तो इसे किस रूप में जाना जाता है ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Activities in which natural products are changed into other forms through ways of manufacturing belong to the secondary sector.
fingerprint: when natural products are converted into other forms through manufacturing it is known as which sector

question_en: In which district of Madhya Pradesh are the Khajuraho group of monuments located?
question_hi: मध्य प्रदेश के किस जिले में खजुराहो समूह के स्मारक स्थित हैं ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: The Khajuraho Group of Monuments is a group of Hindu and Jain temples in Chhatarpur district, Madhya Pradesh.
fingerprint: in which district of madhya pradesh are the khajuraho group of monuments located

question_en: Which of the following is not a part of the Panchayati Raj system in India?
question_hi: भारत में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा पंचायती राज प्रणाली का भाग नहीं है ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Panchayati Raj system consists of Gram Panchayat, Panchayat Samiti, and Zila Parishad. Gram Parishad is not a tier.
fingerprint: which of the following is not a part of the panchayati raj system in india

question_en: Where is the National Gallery of Modern Art located?
question_hi: राष्ट्रीय आधुनिक कला संग्रहालय कहाँ स्थित है ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: The National Gallery of Modern Art (NGMA) is the premier art gallery under Ministry of Culture, located in New Delhi.
fingerprint: where is the national gallery of modern art located

question_en: Which country did India defeat in the final of the Asia Cup ODI cricket tournament held in the year 2023?
question_hi: भारत ने वर्ष 2023 में आयोजित एशिया कप एक दिवसीय क्रिकेट टूर्नामेंट के फाइनल में किस देश को पराजित किया था ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: India defeated Sri Lanka by 10 wickets in the final of the 2023 Asia Cup.
fingerprint: which country did india defeat in the final of the asia cup odi cricket tournament held in the year 2023

question_en: In which year did the United Nations adopt the UN Guidelines for Consumer Protection?
question_hi: संयुक्त राष्ट्र ने किस वर्ष में उपभोक्ता संरक्षण के लिए संयुक्त राष्ट्र दिशानिर्देशों को अपनाया ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: The UN Guidelines for Consumer Protection were adopted by the UN General Assembly in 1985.
fingerprint: in which year did the united nations adopt the un guidelines for consumer protection

question_en: Where is the Salar Jung Museum located?
question_hi: सलारजंग संग्रहालय कहाँ स्थित है ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Salar Jung Museum is an art museum located at Dar-ul-Shifa, on the southern bank of the Musi River in Hyderabad, Telangana.
fingerprint: where is the salar jung museum located

question_en: Consider the following statements about democratic governments. Which statement is not correct?
question_hi: लोकतांत्रिक सरकारों के बारे में निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार कीजिए कौन सा कथन सही नहीं है ?
options_en: Democracy is known as representative democracy.
In a democracy, people have the right to elect their leaders.
Democracy is also known as oligarchy.
options_hi: लोकतंत्र को प्रतिनिधात्मक लोकतंत्र के रूप में जाना जाता है।
लोकतंत्र सार्वभौमिक वयस्क मताधिकार की गारंटी देता है।
लोकतंत्र में लोगों को अपने नेताओं को निर्वाचित करने का अधिकार होता है।
लोकतंत्र को अल्पतंत्र के रूप में भी जाना जाता है।
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Democracy means rule by the people, whereas oligarchy means rule by a few. They are fundamentally different.
fingerprint: consider the following statements about democratic governments which statement is not correct

question_en: Why is the Earth called the 'Blue Planet'?
question_hi: पृथ्वी को ‘नीला ग्रह’ क्यों कहा जाता है ?
options_en: Because more than 91 percent of Earth is covered with water.
Because more than 71 percent of Earth is covered with water.
options_hi: क्योंकि पृथ्वी का 91 प्रतिशत से अधिक पानी से आच्छादित है।
क्योंकि पृथ्वी का 71 प्रतिशत से अधिक पानी से आच्छादित है।
subject: general-science
explanation: The Earth is called the Blue Planet because over 71% of its surface is covered by oceans, making it look blue from space.
fingerprint: why is the earth called the blue planet

question_en: In which year did Gandhiji return to India from South Africa?
question_hi: गाँधीजी दक्षिण अफ्रीका से भारत में किस वर्ष में वापस आए थे?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Mahatma Gandhi returned to India from South Africa on January 9, 1915.
fingerprint: in which year did gandhiji return to india from south africa

question_en: To determine the political future of India, the British government sent a commission in 1927, which was led by:
question_hi: भारत के राजनीतिक भविष्य को निर्धारित करने के लिए ब्रिटिश सरकार ने 1927 में एक आयोग को भेजा था, जिसका नेतृत्व किया था :
subject: general-awareness
explanation: The Simon Commission (Indian Statutory Commission) was appointed in 1927 under the chairmanship of Sir John Simon.
fingerprint: to determine the political future of india the british government sent a commission in 1927 which was led by

question_en: Match the following: List-I List-II (A) Ryot (I) Village (B) Mahal (II) Cultivator (C) Nij (III) Cultivation on Ryot's land (D) Ryoti (IV) Cultivation on own land
question_hi: सुमेलित कीजिए : सूची-I सूची-II (A) रयो (1) गाँव (B) महल (II) खेतिहर (C) निज (III) रयोत की भूमि पर खेती करना (D) रयोती (IV) अपनी भूमि पर खेती करना
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Ryot means Cultivator, Mahal refers to a Village, Nij means cultivation on own land, and Ryoti means cultivation on the Ryot's land.
fingerprint: match the following listi listii a ryot i village b mahal ii cultivator c nij iii cultivation on ryots land d ryoti iv cultivation on own land

question_en: Which continent has the highest number of countries?

subject: general-awareness

question_en: Khabar Lahariya newspaper, run by eight Dalit women in Chitrakoot district of Uttar Pradesh, is published in which local language?

explanation: Khabar Lahariya was originally published in the Bundeli dialect.

subject: general-science

question_en: Species found only in a particular area are called ________.

question_en: Match the items given in Column I with the items given in Column II: (A) Chloroplast - (I) Leguminous plant, (B) Rhizobium - (II) Parasitic plant, (C) Cuscuta (Amarbel) - (III) Leaf, (D) Pitcher plant - (IV) Insectivorous plant.
question_hi: कालम I में दिए गए मदों को कालम II में दिए गए मदों के साथ सुमेलित कीजिए । I – II (A) क्लोरोप्लास्ट (I) फलीदार पौधा (B) राइजोबियस (II) परजीवी पौधा (C) अमरवेल (III) पत्ता (D) पिचर पौधा (IV) कीटभक्षी पौधा
subject: general-science
explanation: Chloroplasts are in leaves. Rhizobium is in roots of leguminous plants. Cuscuta is a parasitic plant. Pitcher plant is an insectivorous plant.
fingerprint: match the items given in column i with the items given in column ii a chloroplast i leguminous plant b rhizobium ii parasitic plant c cuscuta amarbel iii leaf d pitcher plant iv insectivorous plant

question_en: Match the items given in Column I with the items given in Column II: (A) Typhoid - (I) Virus, (B) Hepatitis A - (II) Fungi, (C) Malaria - (III) Bacteria, (D) Wheat rust - (IV) Protozoa.
question_hi: कालम – I में दिए गए मदों को कालम – II में दिए गए मदों के साथ सुमेलित कीजिए : I – II (A) टाइफाइड (I) विषाणु (B) हेपाटाइटिस A (II) कवक (C) मलेरिया (III) जीवाणु (D) गेहूँ का किट्ट् (IV) प्रोटोजोआ
subject: general-science
explanation: Typhoid is bacterial, Hepatitis A is viral, Malaria is protozoan, and Wheat rust is fungal.
fingerprint: match the items given in column i with the items given in column ii a typhoid i virus b hepatitis a ii fungi c malaria iii bacteria d wheat rust iv protozoa

question_en: If a body covers a distance of 100 km in 5 hours, its speed will be _.
question_hi: यदि एक पिंड 100 Km की दूरी 5 घंटों में तय करता है तो इसकी रफ्तार _ होगी।
subject: general-science
explanation: Speed = Distance / Time = 100 km / 5 hrs = 20 km/hr.
fingerprint: if a body covers a distance of 100 km in 5 hours its speed will be
